description_long: This object is a long-barreled shotgun with a traditional wooden stock and a metal barrel. The stock is robust and appears to be made from dark-stained wood, featuring a slightly textured finish for grip. The barrel is slender, metallic, and extends significantly from the receiver, with no visible ribbing or venting along its length. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionate, enclosing a single trigger, and the receiver area is compact and functional. There are no visible external magazines, pumps, or levers, indicating a simple action mechanism. The overall design is classic and utilitarian, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic long-barreled shotgun with a dark wooden stock and a slim metal barrel, featuring a rounded trigger guard and a simple, traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock and long, slender barrel.
description_view_1: Angled view from above the barrel, emphasizing the narrowness of the barrel and the compactness of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, clearly displaying the wooden stock and the uninterrupted length of the metal barrel.
description_view_3: Angled view from above the stock, showing the top of the receiver and the alignment of the barrel with the stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
